mnemonics: A TRIP to the RESOURCES: Analysis Techniques, Reading, Implementation, Practice
keyPoints: Review foundational textbooks for theoretical concepts
Utilize online tutorials and software documentation for practical application
Practice with real-world datasets to solidify understanding
commonMistakes: Relying solely on one resource type (e.g., only videos without textbook reference)
Skipping the implementation step and only reading about techniques
Using inappropriate or poorly cleaned data for practice exercises
